title: Family of Two (A Mother and Son Story)
original_title: Pamilya ng Dalawa (Isang Ina at Anak na Kwento)
overview: The story of Maricar whose world revolves around her son, Mateo, who she raised singlehandedly. When Mateo is moving to Singapore to pursue his career ambition and his girlfriend, he devised a plan to find a good man who can look after her mother while he is gone. At first, this made Maricar furious but eventually she saw the pure intention of her son.
